message:
fix(test): resolve ShellCheck warnings in test scripts

Fixed three ShellCheck warnings that were causing CI failures:

1. SC2155 in test_unit_worktree.sh:47
   - Split "export VAR=\$(cmd)" into separate declaration and export
   - Avoids masking return values from command substitution

2. SC2034 in test_unit_rate_limit_governor.sh:96
   - Added export to REVIEW_PARALLEL variable
   - Variable is used by get_target_parallelism() which reads it from env

3. SC2034 in test_unit_review_push.sh:36
   - Added export to STATE_LOCK_FD variable
   - Variable is used by sourced acquire_state_lock/release_state_lock functions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ test_get_target_parallelism_override() {
     local test_name="get_target_parallelism: respects REVIEW_PARALLEL"
     log_test_start "$test_name"
 
-    REVIEW_PARALLEL=8
+    export REVIEW_PARALLEL=8
     local result
     result=$(get_target_parallelism)

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ source_ru_function "record_review_push"
 source_ru_function "push_worktree_changes"
 
 # Required global used by acquire_state_lock/release_state_lock (normally set in ru)
-STATE_LOCK_FD=201
+export STATE_LOCK_FD=201
 
 # Mock logging used by the functions under test
 log_step() { :; }

@@ -44,7 +44,8 @@ setup_worktree_test() {
     export RU_STATE_DIR="$TEST_DIR/state"
     export PROJECTS_DIR="$TEST_DIR/projects"
     export LAYOUT="flat"
-    export REVIEW_RUN_ID="test-run-$(date +%s)"
+    REVIEW_RUN_ID="test-run-$(date +%s)"
+    export REVIEW_RUN_ID
     mkdir -p "$RU_STATE_DIR" "$PROJECTS_DIR"
 }
